name: Aurel Thorne
description:
Aurel Thorne was once on the path to becoming a full-fledged knight in the prestigious Lionguard of Haldrin, a kingdom known for its proud code and its bloody wars. He excelled in combat, but in his final year, he discovered the order's involvement in the massacre of a border village—a secret covered up by his superiors.

When he tried to speak out, he was branded a traitor and forced to flee.

Now a wandering sword-for-hire, Aurel roams from town to town, taking small jobs to survive while trying to hold onto some kind of moral compass. Though he still dreams of justice, he knows the world is far less noble than the stories once told him.

(Changed) Credits to the Artist: tried, but can't find them...

P.S: Hopefully you would love this character as much as I do, this my first time!
creator: Hiko_Hiko
